title: Plumber
description: A plumber in India installs, maintains, and repairs pipes, fixtures, and appliances that are connected to water and gas systems in residential, commercial, and industrial settings. They work on various tasks such as unclogging drains, fixing leaky faucets, and installing new plumbing systems. Plumber's work is physically demanding and requires them to work in cramped spaces, climb ladders, and lift heavy equipment.

career_progression.entrepreneurship_exit: Start a plumbing business, offer services to residential and commercial clients
career_progression.global_pathway: Work in the Middle East, Gulf countries, or abroad as a skilled plumber

india_social_context.first_year_reality: Challenging to find a job, may have to work as an apprentice for a long time
